name: colorex-wallet
description: Colorex RGB wallet — MV3 browser extension (taker wallet for the Colorex RFQ exchange).
comment: @utexo/rgb-sdk is NOT listed yet: the published package is Node-only. The browser/WASM fork is the project's first milestone (see ROADMAP.md M1). Code targets the WalletSdk interface in src/sdk and runs against a stub until the fork lands.
